official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound game_event packet fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official game_event body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state
Write and dispatch-decode the full official Play clientbound game_event frame

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns game_event to packet id 0x26.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the game_event id to ClientboundGameEventPacket.
The official game_event body is one unsigned-byte event Type id followed by one float param.
The fixture uses a Type constant and float, so it does not require initialized Level, player, weather, registry contents, or game state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded event id, decoded param, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove game event semantics, initialized Level/player/weather state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer game event semantics, initialized Level/player/weather state, render readiness, or client-load completion.
